description: Production dashboard for outline-ss-rust Prometheus metrics.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, short_instance, user, protocol) (label_replace(rate(outline_ss_tcp_upstream_connect_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance",user=~"$user"}[5m]), "short_instance", "$1", "instance", "([^.]+).*")))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, short_instance, user, protocol, result) (label_replace(rate(outline_ss_udp_relay_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance",user=~"$user",result!="success"}[5m]), "short_instance", "$1", "instance", "([^.]+).*")))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, short_instance, user, protocol) (label_replace(rate(outline_ss_udp_relay_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance",user=~"$user",result="success"}[5m]), "short_instance", "$1", "instance", "([^.]+).*")))

panels.description: Rate of SS-2022 UDP datagrams rejected by the per-session anti-replay window. A non-zero value means either a misbehaving/retransmitting client or an active replay attempt.
panels.title: UDP Replay Drops (SS-2022 anti-replay)

title: outline-ss-rust
